title: Fluorescent Neon Green Spray Paint 200ml
features: Fluorescent neon paint has an extra bright matt finish. Each can is a handy 225 ml.
Cans of paint contain no CFCs and will give excellent coverage and adhesion.
Easy and quick spraying operation which helps minimise loss of paint.
Quick drying bright finish makes the surface smooth and good for interior and exterior application.
description: Fluorescent neon paint has an extra bright matt finish. Each can is a handy 225 ml. Cans of paint contain no CFCs and will give excellent coverage and adhesion.
